A manufacturing client was spending 14 hours/week manually routing customer spec requests to 3 different engineers based on product type.

We built a one-step classifier that reads the request, tags it, and drops it in the right engineer's queue.

Small-business AI tip most consultants won't tell you:

You probably already have a SaaS tool that can do 70% of what you want.

Before buying anything new, list the integrations and automations available in the platforms you already pay for. Most ROI hides there, not in a new

The "agentic AI" pitch right now reminds me of RPA in 2018.

Same promise: "it works end-to-end, no humans needed."
Same reality: brittle pipelines, silent failures, and someone on a Slack channel hand-patching outputs at 10pm.
